calendar.matters:
PETITION
Off Calendar Sep-17-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Collin Claxon for Stars Model Management.

Mr. Claxon referred to the Stars Agency contract, stated that the fee agreement is either 20% or 10% not both, that either available Parent will sign for the Minor and that he would pick the Mother if he had to choose one or the other. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-30-2010 Continued To Sep-13-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-23-2010 Continued To Aug-30-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-09-2010 Continued To Aug-23-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Colin Claxon for Stars Model Management.

The Court proceeded without the presence of the Minor and the Minor's Parents. Mr. Claxon eplained the reasons for bringing the petition, how the Minor was paid for the work performed, and stated that two management contracts were necessary as one dealt with movies/film and the other dealt with fashion work. The Court questioned whether there should be two Coogan accounts. The matter was continued to August 23, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and will be taken under submission at that point for the Court to see the Stars Agency guidelines. Mr. Claxon is to submit a proposed order that is used at the Los Angeles Court.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Various Bailiffs.
